validation_rules.Passport: Must be valid for at least 3 months after planned return date.
validation_rules.Blocked Account: Must prove blocked deposit of €11,904 EUR (€992 per month for 12 months) via official providers (Fintiba, Expatrio, Coracle).
validation_rules.Admission Letter: Must be from a recognized German higher education institution (Zulassungsbescheid). Must state program commencement date.
validation_rules.Language Test: Required overall score matching instruction language (usually minimum B2 German or IELTS 6.5 for English programs).

critical_rules: Verify blocked account balance is at least €11,904 EUR.
Admission letter must be in German or English, official seal visible.
Language of instruction in the admission letter must match the language certificate uploaded.
ai_instructions: Verify that the Blocked Account document is official (e.g., Expatrio/Fintiba) and check that the blocked amount is correct.
pass_examples: Fintiba Blocked Account showing €11,904, Zulassungsbescheid from TU Munich, IELTS 7.0.
fail_examples: Standard bank statement uploaded instead of a blocked account confirmation, Blocked account amount is only €10,000.
